products.name: MIL-STD-461 Testing
products.descriptor: Military EMC qualification testing to MIL-STD-461 for defense electronics

evidence.snippet:
MIL-STD-461 Testing
===================
Manufacturers of military equipment turn to Elite for MIL-STD-461 services. Our wide range of equipment, test chambers, and decades of experience assure your EMC testing and qualification is completed on-time and with data accepted.

#### ISO 17025 Accredited Test Lab
Elite is [ISO 17025 accredited through NVLAP](/accreditations/iso-accreditation/) for ALL MIL-STD-461 test methods to deliver high-quality results accepted by U.S. Department of Defense agencies.

products.name: RTCA DO-160 Testing
products.descriptor: Aviation equipment EMC and environmental qualification testing to RTCA DO-160

evidence.snippet:
RTCA DO-160 Testing
===================
Elite performs DO-160 EMC and Environmental Stress testing all in one location. Count on Elite's experts for qualification testing on your aviation equipment.

ISO 17025 Accredited & Experienced
----------------------------------
Elite is [ISO 17025 accredited](https://www.elitetest.com/accreditations/iso-accreditation/) for RTCA DO-160 Aerospace EMC, Lightning, and Environmental Stress Testing in one location.

products.name: Military EMC Testing
products.descriptor: Full-spectrum EMC testing services for military electronic systems to MIL-STD-461 and related standards

evidence.snippet:
Military EMC Testing
====================
Since 1954, Elite has been providing Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) test services for manufacturers of military electronic systems. Because of our commitment to this industry, our staff is experienced with testing sophisticated defense electronics for every branch of the armed services.

#### NVLAP Accreditation for all MIL-STD-461 Tests (Lab Code 100278-0)
Quality matters for MIL-STD testing and for acceptance of test data.  NAVAIR requires electronic systems to be evaluated by a NVLAP accredited EMC laboratory. [Elite is accredited by NVLAP to ISO 17025 (Lab Code 100278-0).](https://www.elitetest.com/accreditations/iso-accreditation/)

products.name: Commercial Aviation EMC Testing
products.descriptor: EMC qualification testing for avionics to DO-160 and OEM aviation standards

evidence.snippet:
Commercial Aviation EMC Testing
===============================
Our EMC experts test your avionics systems to meet aerospace industry standards.

### **Proven Expertise & Reports
**
Our [ISO 17025 accredited lab](https://www.elitetest.com/accreditations/iso-accreditation/) and iNARTE certified EMC test engineers bring decades of experience from testing a diverse range of avionics and providing reports with industry accepted data.

products.name: Vibration & Shock Testing
products.descriptor: Full-spectrum vibration and shock dynamics testing to military, aerospace, and automotive standards

evidence.snippet:
Vibration and Shock Testing
===========================
Complete dynamics testing in one location to industry wide standards.

Elite’s Vibration and Shock Testing lab is one of the largest and most capable in North America. We perform industry-standard and customized test profiles for [Military](/industries/military/), [Aerospace](/industries/aerospace/), [Automotive](/industries/automotive/), [Marine](/industries/marine/), and [Railways](/industries/railroad/). We are [ISO 17025 accredited](/accreditations/) lab.
*   Vibration Machines up to a 8×8 ft table, 78K Force lbs., 4in Stroke, and 6600 lb. Total Payload

products.name: Antenna Performance Testing
products.descriptor: CTIA-authorized OTA antenna performance and wireless certification testing

evidence.snippet:
Antenna Performance Testing
===========================
Elite's wireless specialists have the knowledge, experience, and tools necessary to evaluate high-performance antennas for any wireless application.

--------------------------------------------
[Elite is a CTIA Authorized Test Lab (ATL)](/accreditations/ctia-catl/) for Over-The-Air (OTA) performance testing of Cellular, WiFi, Bluetooth, and Converged Devices. Our wireless specialists and CTIA-compliant Wireless Test Chamber provide developmental, pre-compliance, and CTIA certification testing services.
